heading: Hazard mitigation for insular areas
label: 5204c Hazard mitigation for insular areas
text: The total of contributions under the last sentence of for the insular areas shall not exceed 10 percent of the estimated aggregate amounts of grants to be made under sections 5170b, 5172, 5173, 5174, and 5178 of this title for any disaster: , That the President shall require a 50 percent local match for assistance in excess of 10 percent of the estimated aggregate amount of grants to be made under for any disaster.section 5170c of this title1section 5172 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1Provided
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , , effective 18 months after .Section 5178 of this titlePub. L. 106–390, title II, § 206(c)114 Stat. 1571Oct. 30, 2000Oct. 30, 2000
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Omnibus Insular Areas Act of 1992, and not as part of the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act which comprises this chapter.
